page_content: SOCY201 and SOCY401 are 4-credit rather than 3-credit courses. For students choosing these courses to fulﬁll the requirements of the minor, the minor will be an 18 to 19 credit program. Students admitted to the minor in the spring of their sophomore year who have not yet taken one of the listed statistics/research methods courses ideally will take one in the fall of their junior year and the second in the spring of their junior year.
